Package org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a.enums

Enum Class CdTyp26

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<CdTyp26>
org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a.enums.CdTyp26
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<CdTyp26>, Constable, EMediplanEnum<String>
public enum CdTyp26 extends Enum<CdTyp26> implements EMediplanEnum<String>
HCI INDEX CdTyp26 table (route of administration).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @Nullable CdTyp26
    fromEdqm(RouteOfAdministrationEdqm roa)
    Gets the CdTyp26 code equivalent to the specified EDQM route of administration code, based on the CH EMED EPR concept map.
    @Nullable RouteOfAdministrationEdqm
    toEdqm()
    Gets the EDQM route of administration code equivalent to this CdTyp26 code, based on the CH EMED EPR concept map.
    static CdTyp26
    valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static CdTyp26[]
    values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static CdTyp26[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static CdTyp26 valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • toEdqm

      public @Nullable RouteOfAdministrationEdqm toEdqm()
      Gets the EDQM route of administration code equivalent to this CdTyp26 code, based on the CH EMED EPR concept map.
      Returns:
      The equivalent EDQM route of administration code, if there is one, otherwise null.

    • fromEdqm

      public static @Nullable CdTyp26 fromEdqm(RouteOfAdministrationEdqm roa)
      Gets the CdTyp26 code equivalent to the specified EDQM route of administration code, based on the CH EMED EPR concept map.
      Parameters:
      roa - The EDQM route of administration code.
      Returns:
      The equivalent CdTyp26 code, if there is one, otherwise null.
